name: Talked to insurance adjuster after work injury - did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after work injury - did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly; statements can be used against you.[2] Context: Adjusters seek lowball settlements.[2] Key factors: Recorded calls common; avoid admitting fault. Practical guidance: Stop talking; get lawyer to handle. Review what said. Many recover anyway.
